da3_multiview.target: DA3-SMALL fixed three-view plus SOH real-image and robot video-derived upstream-vs-MLX parity for depth, confidence, extrinsics, intrinsics, and selected aux taps
da3_multiview.license_note: Apache-2.0 weight license for DA3-SMALL and DA3-BASE; DA3-LARGE/GIANT non-commercial variants are out of scope
da3_multiview.local_fixture_kind: committed monocular tiny fixture plus out-of-git real DA3-SMALL converted multi-view weights

real_checkpoint_load_forward.notes: Strict local DA3-SMALL load now includes six documented default-initialized aux LayerNorm tensors for levels 1-3, yielding 443 local parameters from 437 upstream checkpoint tensors.

da3_multiview.passed_reason: DA3-SMALL required upstream-vs-MLX fixed three-view, SOH real-image, and robot video-derived parity passed outside sandbox with explicit measured tolerances for depth, confidence, extrinsics, intrinsics, and selected aux taps.

passed_gate.command: UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/mlx-cv-uv-cache MLX_CV_REQUIRE_DA3_GATE=1 MLX_CV_DA3_MODEL_ID=depth-anything/DA3-SMALL PYTHONPATH=references/Depth-Anything-3/src uv run --extra test --extra mlx --extra da3-reference pytest tests/test_da3_upstream_parity.py tests/test_da3_real_forward.py tests/test_da3_real_checkpoint_load.py tests/test_da3_multiview_model.py tests/test_da3_multiview_processor.py

locateanything.checkpoint_ready_command: UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/mlx-cv-uv-cache MLX_CV_REQUIRE_LOCATEANYTHING_GATE=1 MLX_CV_LOCATEANYTHING_CHECKPOINT=/path/to/LocateAnything-3B MLX_CV_LOCATEANYTHING_LOCAL_CHECKPOINT=/path/to/locateanything-mlx.npz uv run --extra test pytest tests/test_la_upstream_parity.py tests/test_runtime_dependency_guards.py -q
locateanything.passed_reason: LocateAnything-3B real upstream-vs-MLX parity passed outside sandbox with the downloaded nvidia/LocateAnything-3B checkpoint and a converted local MLX .npz: 769/769 converted params matched the local model exactly, decoded boxes/points matched exactly, and selected taps were within documented tolerances.

passed_gate.checkpoint: out-of-git models store: locateanything/upstream (nvidia/LocateAnything-3B) + locateanything/mlx/locateanything-3b.npz (769/769 params matched)
passed_gate.reference_transformers_pin: transformers==4.56.2 (custom modeling code overrides _check_and_adjust_attn_implementation without the allow_all_kernels kwarg newer transformers pass)
passed_gate.command: MLX_CV_LOCATEANYTHING_CHECKPOINT=$STORE/locateanything/upstream MLX_CV_LOCATEANYTHING_LOCAL_CHECKPOINT=$STORE/locateanything/mlx/locateanything-3b.npz UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/mlx-cv-uv-cache uv run --extra mlx --extra da3-reference --with transformers==4.56.2 --with peft --with accelerate python (call tools/locateanything_upstream.evaluate_locateanything_comparison_gate); reproducible form in the models-store README

passed_gate.command: UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/mlx-cv-uv-cache MLX_CV_REQUIRE_RFDETR_GATE=1 MLX_CV_RFDETR_NANO_CHECKPOINT=/tmp/mlx-cv-checkpoints/rf-detr-nano.pth PYTHONPATH=references/rf-detr/src uv run pytest -q tests/test_rfdetr_upstream_parity.py tests/test_rfdetr_real_forward.py tests/test_rfdetr_parity.py tests/test_rfdetr_predict.py tests/test_rfdetr_nano_decoder.py tests/test_rfdetr_processor.py

sam3_image.status: BLOCKED:MLX_CV_SAM3_IMAGE_CHECKPOINT is unset; faithful MLX detector ported (1468/1468) and the transformers-native end-to-end parity gate is wired, awaiting an out-of-sandbox checkpoint run
sam3_image.target: SAM 3.1 image-mode upstream reference parity for text and PCS prompts
sam3_image.checkpoint_source: official SAM 3.1 image checkpoint source or approved local cache
sam3_image.checkpoint_filename: SAM 3.1 image checkpoint file supplied out of git
sam3_image.checkpoint_provenance: no usable SAM 3.1 image checkpoint checksum recorded in this workspace
sam3_image.license_note: SAM weight license; surfaced, not redistributed
sam3_image.comparison_scope: public masks, paired boxes/scores/class_ids, text token ids and text embeddings
sam3_image.blocked_reason: Faithful MLX SAM 3.1 image detector is ported end-to-end (slices 2-7 of 2026-06-18-sam3-real-architecture-port): all 1468 detector_model.* tensors load 1:1 into mlx_cv.models.sam3.real_modeling.Sam3Model via real_convert.load_sam3_detector_real_weights, and tools/sam3_upstream.py runs the transformers-native upstream-vs-MLX parity gate over end-to-end taps (vision.last_hidden_state, pred_logits, pred_boxes, presence_logits, pred_masks, semantic_seg). BLOCKED only on supplying the gated facebook/sam3 HF checkpoint plus a converted local MLX .npz and running the gate out-of-sandbox; NOT on architecture or converter (the earlier reduced clean-room gap is closed).
sam3_image.checkpoint_ready_command: UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/mlx-cv-uv-cache MLX_CV_REQUIRE_SAM3_IMAGE_GATE=1 MLX_CV_SAM3_IMAGE_CHECKPOINT=/path/to/sam3-image-mlx.npz MLX_CV_SAM3_IMAGE_LOCAL_CHECKPOINT=/path/to/sam3-image-mlx.npz MLX_CV_SAM3_IMAGE_UPSTREAM_CHECKPOINT=/path/to/sam3-image.pt uv run --extra test pytest tests/test_sam3_upstream_parity.py tests/test_sam3_predict.py tests/test_runtime_dependency_guards.py -q
sam3_image.transformers_gate_command: UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/mlx-cv-uv-cache MLX_CV_REQUIRE_SAM3_IMAGE_GATE=1 MLX_CV_SAM3_IMAGE_CHECKPOINT=/path/to/facebook-sam3 MLX_CV_SAM3_IMAGE_LOCAL_CHECKPOINT=/path/to/sam3-detector-mlx.npz uv run --extra test --with 'transformers>=5.10,<6' --with torch pytest tests/test_sam3_upstream_hf.py -q -k gate_runs_when_required

sam3_video.comparison_scope: masks, boxes, track IDs, object scores, score-probability taps, and stable Object Multiplex metadata
sam3_video.blocked_reason: Real facebook/sam3.1 checkpoint (sam3.1_multiplex.pt) is now downloaded out-of-git, but the local MLX SAM3VideoModel is a reduced clean-room architecture (53 tracker params) that does not match the real tracker (457 params incl. a 122-param memory-attention transformer the local model lacks; sam_mask_decoder 125 vs local 25). The converter does not recognize the real tracker.model.* namespace. BLOCKED on a faithful MLX re-port of the real SAM 3.1 tracker + a matching converter, NOT on weights/conversion tooling.
sam3_video.checkpoint_ready_command: UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/mlx-cv-uv-cache MLX_CV_REQUIRE_SAM3_VIDEO_GATE=1 MLX_CV_SAM3_VIDEO_CHECKPOINT=/path/to/sam3.1_multiplex.pt MLX_CV_SAM3_VIDEO_CONFIG=/path/to/config.json MLX_CV_SAM3_VIDEO_LOCAL_CHECKPOINT=/path/to/sam3-video-mlx.npz uv run --extra test pytest tests/test_sam3_video_upstream_parity.py tests/test_sam3_video_checkpoint_gate.py tests/test_runtime_dependency_guards.py -q
